about.short_bio: AI-focused Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience specializing in AI-powered applications, React, Next.js, and Node.js.
detailed_bio: I'm a Full-Stack JavaScript Developer with 3+ years of professional experience, currently working at eSparkBiz, where I help build modern web applications used in real-world production environments.

Full-Stack Expertise: I specialize in building end-to-end web and SaaS products. On the frontend, I work extensively with React and Next.js, crafting clean, responsive, and user-friendly interfaces using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui. On the backend, I design and develop reliable, scalable systems using Node.js, along with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Hasura for API and data orchestration.

Agentic AI Solutions: Beyond traditional full-stack development, I've been actively building Agentic AI applications. I develop AI agents and RAG-based chatbots using LangChain, LangGraph, Claude Agent SDK, vector databases, and prompt engineering-integrating them into real products that deliver intelligent, context-aware experiences.
Automation & Workflows: I've developed automation workflows using tools like Windmill and Hyperbrowser to streamline processes and generate intelligent reports, helping teams work smarter and faster.

End-to-End Ownership: I've implemented authentication systems, integrated Stripe payments, designed database schemas, and contributed to architectural decisions-taking ownership of features from idea to production.
At my core, I enjoy solving real-world problems, learning new technologies, and building scalable, maintainable software that delivers actual value - not just code.

hero.description: AI-focused full-stack developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable web applications and Agentic AI solutions. I specialize in React and Next.js on the frontend, build reliable backend systems with Node.js, and develop AI agents, RAG-based chatbots, and automation workflows using LangGraph, LangChain, and Claude Agent SDK to deliver production-ready solutions on modern cloud architectures. I also leverage tools like Cursor, ChatGPT, and Claude Code to boost development productivity.

projects.title: Revitk
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Sales Intelligence & Coaching Platform
projects.description: Multi-tenant B2B SaaS platform with dual-mode AI (autonomous agent skills + streaming chat) enabling sales teams to analyze calls, track rep performance, and generate sales deliverables with cross-session coaching memory.
projects.long_description: Revitk is a multi-tenant B2B SaaS AI platform that combines sales call coaching, performance analytics, and intelligent content generation. The platform enables organizations to load customer-specific GTM (Go-To-Market) frameworks and sales methodologies into AI-delivering autonomous skill execution, streaming chat, and data-driven coaching insights. The platform features a sophisticated dual-mode AI architecture: Autonomous Agent Skills powered by Claude Agent SDK for complex multi-step tasks (call analysis, deliverable generation, GTM extraction) - Streaming Chat Mode for conversational exploration with full customer and GTM context - Sales Coach System with automatic call classification, competency scoring, and cross-session coaching memory, Key differentiators include third-party integrations (Fathom, Zapier) for automatic transcript ingestion, a focus thread system that tracks coaching recommendations across calls, and background job processing for async operations like memory extraction and rep synopsis generation.

images.caption: Organization dashboard with AI chat, team management, and analytics
AI-powered sales coaching platform for B2B founders
AI-powered call review with sales feedback and competency scoring
Autonomous AI agent skill execution with real-time tool lifecycle tracking
API usage analytics with token metrics, model usage, and skills breakdown
Third-party integrations with Fathom and Zapier for automatic transcript ingestion

responsibilities: Architected a dual-mode AI system with autonomous agent skills (Claude Agent SDK) and streaming chat via unified skill execution engine
Designed dynamic GTM context injection system loading customer-specific frameworks into AI workflows with ~35% token reduction via Anthropic prompt caching
Built autonomous skill execution engine with real-time SSE streaming, tool lifecycle events, and Redis-based status updates
Developed Sales Coach skill with automatic call type classification (5 frameworks: I.C.L.O.S.E.D., Discovery, Demo, Proposal, One-Call Close) and competency scoring
Implemented cross-session coaching memory system with role-scoped access (owner sees team, member sees personal) and Redis caching with automatic invalidation
Built third-party integrations: Fathom OAuth with webhook-based transcript ingestion, Zapier webhook support with HMAC signature verification
Developed background job processing with BullMQ workers for memory extraction, transcript ingestion, rep synopsis generation, and email delivery
Implemented Performance Dashboard with rolling (last 5 calls) and all-time competency scores, trend detection, and coaching focus recommendations
Built focus thread system tracking 'one thing to fix' recommendations across calls with progress check verdicts (yes/partial/no)
Developed rep matching system that automatically links transcript rep names to organization team members
Implemented multi-tenant architecture with organization-level data isolation and platform-level admin (Thanos Mode) capabilities
Built role-based access control with platform roles (Admin) and org roles (Owner, Admin, Member) with granular permissions
Developed Admin panel with client organization management, read-only chat history view, cross-org analytics, and MinIO storage browser
Built AI-powered document generators producing PDF, DOCX, Excel, PPTX, and text deliverables with version tracking
Implemented resumable SSE streaming with reconnection support for network resilience
Designed global and org-level kill switches for automatic transcript ingestion with discarded call logging
achievements: Reduced sales deliverable creation time by ~80% through autonomous AI skill execution
Achieved ~35% token cost reduction via Anthropic prompt caching on system prompts and GTM context
Improved AI context load time by ~40% using Redis caching with intelligent invalidation
Achieved 99.9% streaming reliability with resumable stream architecture and reconnection support
Built Sales Coach analyzing 5 call types with automatic classification based on structural signals (not user input)
Implemented competency scoring across 4 dimensions: Process Control, Discovery Depth, Objection Handling, Outcome Positioning
Developed discovery sub-skills assessment (6 areas) with RAG-style rating (yes/partial/no)
Built coachability tracking identifying lowest-scoring areas per rep and monitoring improvement attempts across calls
Implemented focus thread providing AI with historical coaching context for continuity across sessions
Created automatic transcript ingestion pipeline via Fathom/Zapier webhooks with deduplication and async processing
Built cross-session coaching memory persisting key insights with role-scoped visibility
Developed 'Most Improved' rep detection and team-level coaching focus identification
Implemented Thanos Mode allowing platform admin to access all client GTM frameworks simultaneously
Built real-time skill execution with SSE streaming of tool lifecycle events and progress tracking
Created escalation detection system flagging recurring coaching issues for human review
Implemented transcript content hashing for deduplication across ingestion sources

projects.title: Jurnii
projects.subtitle: AI-Driven UX Intelligence Platform
projects.description: Enterprise SaaS platform leveraging AI to deliver comprehensive UX intelligence by analyzing web and mobile experiences with automated UX audit reports.
projects.long_description:
Jurnii is an enterprise-grade SaaS platform that delivers automated UX intelligence for web and mobile experiences. The platform leverages AI to analyze screenshots, recordings, and design artifacts, generating rich UX audit reports across Performance, Journey, Usability, and Perception dimensions.

What started as a proof of concept quickly evolved into a funded, revenue-generating product after stakeholders were impressed by the depth and clarity of the AI-generated reports. The platform is now actively used by clients and generates significant business value.

The platform offers two core products:
- **Analysis Product** – Generates detailed UX audit reports for websites, supporting both Expert Reports (in-depth single-site analysis) and Competitor Reports (comparative benchmarking across multiple sites)
- **Customer 360 (C360)** – Aggregates and visualizes promotional content and marketing campaigns through automated scraping and rich analytics dashboards

Intelligent search to execute rich UX reports on any website
Overall UX score with detailed breakdown
Performance metrics and optimization recommendations
User journey mapping and flow analysis
Usability heuristics and accessibility insights
Brand perception and visual design analysis
C360 product for promotional content aggregation

projects.title: Medical Ocean
projects.subtitle: Enterprise EHR & Hospital Management Platform
projects.description: Comprehensive, enterprise-grade Electronic Health Records (EHR) SaaS platform for managing patient records, appointments, billing, and clinical workflows.
projects.long_description:
Medical Ocean is a comprehensive, enterprise-grade Electronic Health Records (EHR) SaaS platform designed to help healthcare organizations manage patient records, appointments, billing, and clinical workflows. The platform supports multi-organization and multi-location healthcare operations with real-time scheduling, standardized medical coding, and robust financial workflows.

The platform promotes interoperability, data-driven decision-making, and HIPAA-compliant healthcare operations for multi-location healthcare organizations. It features comprehensive patient management with demographics, medical history, allergies, vitals tracking, and ICD-11 medical coding integration.

images.caption: Real-time appointment scheduling with calendar integration
Practitioner worklist with live appointment status

invoice management

projects.title: Twindo
projects.subtitle: Wind Energy Management Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade, cloud-based platform designed to digitally transform wind energy operations with project planning, workforce management, and analytics.
projects.long_description:
Twindo is an enterprise-grade, cloud-based platform designed to digitally transform wind energy operations. It streamlines project planning, workforce management, safety and quality workflows, data tracking, and analytics across wind farms through a scalable and highly customizable system tailored for the renewable energy sector.

The platform enables efficient management of wind farm operations with features like dynamic form building for inspections and safety checks, advanced job planning with multi-slot scheduling, and interactive map integration for visualizing wind sites and operational data.
